text: How do you usually travel to work or college?

Now I'm going to give you a topic. Describe something you did that was new or exciting. You should say: what you did; where and when you did this; who you shared the activity with; and explain why this activity was new or exciting for you. You have one minute to prepare, then speak for one to two minutes.

Now I'm going to give you a topic. Describe a memorable journey or trip you have taken. You should say: where you went; who you went with; what you did there; and explain why this journey was memorable for you. You have one minute to prepare, then speak for one to two minutes.
Why do you think some people are more willing to try new things than others?
